bugs.error_message: sed: 无法读取 /home/gugumur/.agents/skills/Skywork Document/SKILL.md: 没有那个文件或目录
bugs.root_cause: Used the display skill name as a filesystem path instead of the actual lowercase directory name.
bugs.fix: Read the skill from the actual path `/home/gugumur/.agents/skills/skywork-document/SKILL.md` and continued with local Markdown document creation.

bugs.error_message: The local `od` command resolves to GNU coreutils and npm package names `open-design`, `@nexu/open-design`, and `@open-design/cli` are not installable from the public npm registry.
bugs.root_cause: Open Design is distributed as a separate repository/product with its own local daemon and CLI, not as a normal dependency of this Vue project.
bugs.fix: Configured project-level Open Design files (`DESIGN.md` and `skills/.../SKILL.md`) and documented that the official Open Design CLI must be installed before running `od mcp install codex`.

bugs.root_cause: `frontend-skill` is not present in the current `openai/skills` curated list.
bugs.fix: Listed curated skills with `list-skills.py --format json`; no install was performed. User needs to provide a valid skill name or GitHub repo/path.
